title: microseris lindleyi
intro: Microseris lindleyi, also known as Lindley's broomweed or silver broomweed, is a perennial herb native to the western United States and Canada. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that may aid in wound healing and reducing pain. The health benefits of Microseris lindleyi are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Microseris lindleyi can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy as a treatment for various health conditions.
